title: Ctenopteris semiadnata
uses: Ctenopteris semiadnata has been used in traditional medicine in various cultures. The plant is believed to possess anti-inflammatory properties, which may help alleviate symptoms associated with fever and pain. It is also used to treat respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds. In addition, Ctenopteris semiadnata is thought to have antimicrobial properties, making it useful for wound healing and preventing infection. More research is needed to fully understand the medicinal uses and potential benefits of Ctenopteris semiadnata.

constituents: Ctenopteris semiadnata is a type of fern native to Australia.
